cleanup: M16 numeric-metadata normalization on reused exact_answer rows
note_on_count: Only counts rows M16 NEWLY tagged (the reused exact pool, prefix m15_e_). The 20 m15_n_ rows were the numeric pool and already carried numeric metadata pre-M16.
note: Counts/verdicts only, no task text. M16 tagged numeric-answer exact rows that previously lacked numeric metadata so they now route to numeric_tolerant_check. The speed-of-light row flips old exact-match FAIL -> new numeric PASS, auto_was_wrong False, no longer escalates. auto_outcome is a CANDIDATE; production/final thresholds stay gold/audit gated.
